Improving Your AWS CSPM with CosmicArmorPro

CSPM tools like CosmicArmorPro can help automate security audits, identify vulnerabilities and misconfigurations, and enable your team to prioritize the most critical actions to take. With the help of CSPM tools, organizations can maintain a strong security posture and minimize the risk of cyber attacks.

Preventing AWS Ransomware Attacks With CosmicArmor Open Source

It’s criminally easy to roll out a fear-mongering list of industries, victims, and financial penalties related to ransomware. Gas pipelines, healthcare systems, local governments, all have been hit. Nearly every headline is some form of: “And it’s only getting worse—are Ransomware attacks the new digital pandemic?”  It can seem inevitable, but when it comes to your AWS environment, there’s a few things you can do to protect yourself by reducing your attack surface, and then use CosmicArmor to keep an eye on it all continuously.
